body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/sourceId/{sourceId}/updateMultilevelSourceName 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/sourceId/{sourceId}/updateMultilevelSourceName 
 ## 接口描述 
费控 单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ： 根据数据源ID修改数据源名称 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90Id","required":true,"exampleValue":"1000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E5%90%8E%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","name":"selectSourceName","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7%E6%94%B9%20","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","exampleValue":"XFT000000","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
```json
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/sourceId/123/updateMultilevelSourceName?OPAUID=XFT000000&selectSourceName=数据源1号改
```

###返回示例
```json
{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":  "修改数据源名称成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/sourceId/{sourceId}/updateMultilevelSourceName

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/sourceId/{sourceId}/updateMultilevelSourceName

接口描述

费控 单据配置 --> 自定义字段 --> 层级选择 --> 对应选项数据源 ： 根据数据源ID修改数据源名称

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90Id","required":true,"exampleValue":"1000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","maxLength":"128","label":"%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E5%90%8E%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","name":"selectSourceName","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7%E6%94%B9%20","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","exampleValue":"XFT000000","required":true}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例

{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/sourceId/123/updateMultilevelSourceName?OPAUID=XFT000000&selectSourceName=数据源1号改

###返回示例

{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":  "修改数据源名称成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
